fields.name: Unique ID
fields.tooltip: This object supports the Microsoft Dynamics NAV infrastructure and is intended only for internal use.

fields.name: Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the public folder that is specified for use with email logging.

fields.name: FullPath
fields.tooltip: Specifies the complete path to the public folder that is specified for use with email logging.

fields.name: Depth
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of levels that must be navigated to reach the public folder that is identified for use with email logging.

fields.name: Cached
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the path information for the public folder is cached.
